questions.question: India has signed as many as 15 agreements with which country, after the virtual bilateral summit?
questions.explanation: India and Italy have signed 15 agreements in various sectors during the virtual Bilateral Prime Minister’s meet that held on November 7, 2020.The agreements are expected to provide for cooperation in a wide range of sectors like energy, green energy, shipbuilding, media etc. and to review the bilateral relationship.

questions.question: ‘(Atal Innovation Mission) AIM-Sirius Innovation Programme’ has been launched for the students of India and which country?
questions.explanation: Russia’s SIRIUS and Atal Innovation Mission (AIM) has recently launched ‘AIM–Sirius Innovation Programme 3.0’.It is a 14-day virtual programme for Indian and Russian schoolchildren. It is also the first Indo-Russian bilateral youth innovation initiative, which envisages to develop technological solutions for both countries.

questions.question: Which state is set to withdraw a section of its force from the border with Assam?
questions.explanation: Mizoram is set to withdraw a section of its forces from the border with Assam. In their place, the Border Security Force (BSF) personnel will be deployed.This decision was taken at a meeting between the chief secretaries of Assam and Mizoram, chaired by the Union Home Secretary Ajay Kumar Bhalla. Three companies of the Border Security Force (BSF) have arrived in the state.

questions.question: Which country has recently brought major relaxation in Islamic laws?
questions.explanation: The United Arab Emirates (UAE) has recently announced relaxations to Islamic laws. These relaxations allowing unmarried couples to cohabitate, lifts some restrictions on alcohols and on criminalising honour killings.This is seen as a major step towards westernisation of the nation and aims to improve personal freedom.

questions.question: Which Ministry has given approval for creation for National Database of Unorganised Workers?
questions.explanation: The Union Ministry of Finance has given an approval for creation of the first ever national database of migrant labour called the National Database of Unorganised Workers (NDUW), which would be seeded with Aadhaar.This database would provide a platform for the government to implement specific programmes for such labourers

questions.question: What word has been selected as the Collins Dictionary word of the year 2020?
questions.explanation: The word “Lockdown” has been selected as the Collins Dictionary word of the year 2020. The word has been chosen for a sudden increase in usage of the word during the spread of Covid-19. Lexicographers have stated that they have picked the word since it had become synonymous with the experience of populations across the world as governments look to curb the coronavirus pandemic.

questions.question: India announced to support the candidature of Abdullah Shahid, the Foreign Minister of which country, for the UNGA Presidency in 2021?
questions.explanation: India and Maldives have recently signed two MoUs for High-impact community development projects, MoU on cooperation in sports and youth affairs and another MoU for the USD 100 million grant for the Greater Male Connectivity Project (GMCP).India also affirmed its support for Maldive’s Foreign Minister Shahid’s candidature for the Presidency of the 76th session of the UN General Assembly in 2021.

questions.question: What is the abbreviation of ‘IBSA’, that is seen in news recently?
questions.explanation: India-Brazil-South Africa (IBSA) report titled ‘Deepening Cooperation in IBSA: Perspectives from Key Sectors’ has been launched recently. The report has been launched by the Secretary, Ministry of External Affairs Rahul Chhabra. The report has been prepared by the 2nd batch of Fellows under the IBSA Visiting Fellowship Program.

questions.question: Which country has signed a peace agreement with Russia and Azerbaijan to end the war over Nagorno-Karabakh?
questions.explanation: The Prime Minister of Armenian has announced that a peace agreement has been signed with Russia and Azerbaijan. The agreement aims to end the war between Armenia and Azerbaijan over the disputed area of Nagorno-Karabakh. Under the agreement, all military operations in the disputed area have been stopped and Russia has deployed peacekeeping forces in the Armenia – Azerbaijan border.

questions.question: Which state has launched Mukhya Mantri Rural Street Vendor Scheme?
questions.explanation: The Mukhya Mantri Rural Street Vendor Scheme has been launched by the state government of Madhya Pradesh, on the lines of Pradhan Mantri street vendor schemeRecently, the Chief Minister transferred the interest-free loan of 10 thousand rupees each into the accounts of rural street vendors. He also launched a roadmap to Aatma Nirbhar Madhya Pradesh, with special focus on education and health.
